Team.title: Team
Team.description: A team of members and its administrators

id.description: The unique ID of the team

name.description: The friendly name of the team

dashboardActive.description: Whether the dashboard is open for members

Submission.title: Submission
Submission.description: A survey response containing scores and user details

id.description: The unique ID of the submission

isSkipped.description: Whether to exclude this submission from score averages

User.title: User
User.description: A registered user in the application representing user authentication details in Firestore

email.description: The unique email address of the user

password.description: Optional user password for authentication verification purposes

teams/{teamId}.description: The teams that users can submit surveys to

users/{email}.description: The users authentication table in Firestore
